meta.title: Sandboxx App - New Features Coming Soon!
meta.description:
Sending Letters to basic training has never been easier than with the Sandboxx app. Since our founding four years ago, over 2 million Letters have been sent to basic training using the Sandboxx app. Users love that every Letter they send to basic training comes with Sandboxx tracking, allowing them to see exactly when their Sandboxx Letters get to base, along with all the other features that are included with Sandboxx. 

With our growing team and new technology, we are going to be able to add even more incredible features to Sandboxx in 2019, including increasing our Letter capacity, to help you continue to stay connected throughout your military journey.

Download Sandboxx:
https://link.sandboxx.us/baQKfjSOxS
